title: sagotia triflora
intro: Sagotia triflora, also known as the yellow myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Staphyladaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of Sagotia triflora have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Sagotia triflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
